pi_items.source: Task description and referenced in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
Verified against Stripe API documentation (https://docs.stripe.com/api) - this is the correct Stripe API v1 base endpoint
Verified against AWS documentation (https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/rande.html) - us-east-1 is a valid AWS region code for US East (N. Virginia)
Task description specifies this as the variable name; sk_live_ prefix format verified against Stripe documentation (https://docs.stripe.com/keys)

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Azure DevOps Pipeline Secrets using the Stripe API. The Gateway_Url metadata value 'https://api.stripe.com/v1' is the verified correct Stripe API v1 base endpoint. The Region_Code 'us-east-1' is a verified valid AWS region code for US East (N. Virginia). The secret variable name 'Live_Secret_Key' follows the verified Stripe live mode key naming convention (sk_live_ prefix). The expected variable group name 'PaymentService-Prod' is task-specific. All metadata values are consistent with external authoritative sources where applicable.
